channel.title: GrantOtter — Federal Funding Updates
channel.description: Aggregated weekly feed of grant opportunities and agency news from NIH, NSF, and DARPA.

item.title: AMPED
item.description: MTO is soliciting innovative research proposals for the Area-Multiplied Photonic-crystal Enhanced Devices (AMPED) program | See Program

item.title: Mark Your Calendars: Spring–Summer 2026 NIH National Advisory Council or Board (NACs) Meetings
item.description: We are sharing upcoming NIH National Advisory Council or Board (NAC) meetings for your awareness.

item.title: Notice of Change: Expiration of RFA-DK-26-308 Limited Competition Renewal for the Continuation of the Liver Cirrhosis Network: Clinical Research Centers (U01 Clinical Trial Required)
item.description: Notice NOT-DK-26-105 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: DARPA XRQ-73 demonstrates hybrid-electric flight
item.description: DARPA, in collaboration with the Air Force Research Laboratory and Northrop Grumman, flew the XRQ-73 as part of the SHEPARD program.

item.title: Notice of Change: Expiration of RFA-DK-26-309 -- Single Source Renewal for the Continuation of the Liver Cirrhosis Network: Scientific and Data Coordination Center (U24 Clinical Trial Optional)
item.description: Notice NOT-DK-26-106 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Podcast: Using AI to explore shipwrecks
item.description: Artificial intelligence advancements in machine learning are allowing autonomous exploration in remote underwater environments. Katie Skinner discusses work advancing the field of robotics...

item.title: Selecting the Right Models for Your Research: A Focus on New Approach Methodologies (NAMs)
item.description: NIH supports a wide range of scientifically sound approaches to advance our understanding of human health and disease. As we continue to encourage approaches that enhance human relevance and translational potential, investigators should still select the models most appropriate for their specific research questions.
